requirements: Educational display path showing LOX tank structure without functional flow.
Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, or mating pads are visible and labeled.
Critical slip, snap, pin, hinge, and slide interfaces state plausible clearances.
Each subsystem has at least three adjacent interfaces or datums.
Fits are named with standard intent: clearance fit for sliding, transition for locating, interference/press only where justified, with a numeric allowance.
Holes, slots, and pockets match real catalog hardware sizes (M3/M4 clearance holes, standard bearing OD, common pin diameters).
Tank, interstage, avionics, recovery, and engine-display modules are labeled educational/display-only.
Cutaway shows tank dummies, interstage datum, avionics bay, recovery bay, and removable engine display cartridge.
Risk/verification focuses on mockup structure, inspection, interfaces, and unsafe overclaiming.
Interstage and module joints show locating datums, bolt-circle dummies, and alignment keys so the mock stack assembles repeatably for review.
